findings.message: Prefer COPY over ADD for copying local resources. ADD has additional features (auto-extraction of archives, fetching remote URLs) that can introduce unexpected behavior and security risks. Use COPY for local files and directories, and only use ADD when you specifically need to extract tar archives or fetch remote resources.
